headline: Jim Cramer Warns This Market Is Far More Brutal Than Dot-Com Bubble Era: 'The Difference Between Now And 1999 Is...'
summary: Jim Cramer says investors are aggressively favoring AI stocks while heavily punishing companies that disappoint Wall Street.
